description_long: This is a small, single-engine airplane with a high-wing configuration and a streamlined fuselage, commonly seen in general aviation. The body is primarily white with blue accents running along the sides, and the wings are broad and straight, mounted above the cockpit. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the landing gear consists of two main wheels and a nose wheel, all fixed and exposed. The tail section features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The cockpit is enclosed with clear windows, positioned at the front of the fuselage, and appears to be designed for one or two occupants. The overall appearance suggests a light aircraft suitable for personal or training use, often found at small airports or airfields near urban areas.
description: A small, high-wing, single-engine airplane with a white and blue color scheme, fixed tricycle landing gear, and a streamlined, enclosed cockpit. The design is typical of general aviation aircraft used for personal or training purposes.
description_view_0: Side view showing the high-mounted wing, blue and white fuselage, nose-mounted propeller, and fixed tricycle landing gear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the broad wingspan, central propeller, and the symmetrical placement of the landing gear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same high-wing structure, tail section, and the streamlined body with blue striping.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail assembly, single vertical stabilizer, and the horizontal stabilizers, with the cockpit windows visible at the front.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with side windows, likely configured for one or two seats.
